_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning about how to manage personal finances — including saving money and keeping it safe.

_source.w: We are learning about how to manage personal finances — including saving money and keeping it safe.
y: Managing money well helps us achieve our goals and avoid unnecessary stress.
Knowing how to keep money safe protects us from theft and scams.
Building good financial habits now sets us up for independence and security in the future.
eg: Setting a savings goal and planning how much to save each week to reach it.
Discussing the difference between saving in a piggy bank and saving in a bank account.
Exploring how bank accounts keep money safer than carrying cash.
Investigating basic online safety for money — why we should never share passwords or PINs.
Creating a simple personal budget that tracks income and expenses.
Discussing how Aboriginal trade networks involved careful management of valued resources.
